Travel insurance

ANZ Platinum/Black complimentary International Travel Insurance, via Allianz Global Assistance — covers Michael (cardholder) and Gerard (spouse) for the full trip.
Reference numberANZFBLT0058587
Insured travellersMichael Juranek (cardholder), Gerard Lennox (spouse)
Card / policyANZ Frequent Flyer Black card — Allianz Global Assistance Group Policy
Cover dates23 Jul 2026 – 11 Aug 2026
Destinations on policyVietnam, France, Netherlands (Amsterdam), Qatar, Belgium, Germany
24/7 emergency assistanceFrom overseas: +61 7 3305 7465
From Australia: 1800 010 075
ClaimsOnline at claimmanager.com.au/anz or call 1300 135 271
Key limitsOverseas emergency medical & evacuation: $20M each · Cancellation: up to $20,000/person · Additional expenses: $100,000 · Excess: up to $500/claim

Pre‑existing medical conditions aren't covered unless confirmed in writing by Allianz beforehand. Keep flight/travel invoices and card statements handy in case a claim needs to prove eligibility.

Practical notes

Vietnam e‑visa: required to leave Ho Chi Minh City airport during the 16‑hour layover — apply a few business days before departure, or the layover has to stay airside.

Big crowds (CSD Berlin, Canal Parade): agree on a meeting point before you split up, and make sure everyone has a screenshot of the day's accommodation address saved offline.

Documents: keep a photo of your passport photo page and travel insurance details saved offline on your phone, separate from the physical documents.

Money: tell your bank/card provider about the countries and dates you're travelling to avoid cards being blocked for suspicious activity.
